Have you or people within your household experienced this change?
How many other people in this village do you think have experienced this change?
For how long do you think people will benefit from this change?
How important is this change to you?
If this change stopped happening, how much money would your household need to receive each month to make up for losing it?

options.label: Conflict or tension within the community
Loss of income or economic opportunity
Reduced access to land or natural resources
